beats.text: If you remember one thing from today, what would it be?
What's the most important thing you learned?
options: An array has rows AND columns
The same array can give you two different expressions

condition.selected: An array has rows AND columns

beats.text: Rows and columns. That's what makes an array different from just a bunch of groups. You'll keep using that.
That's the rule. What you SAY determines what you WRITE. Precise language, precise math.

condition.selected: The same array can give you two different expressions

beats.text: Two descriptions, two expressions, one array. That's something we'll come back to next time.
